message.content: {"items":[{"title":"German General Social Survey - ALLBUS 1990","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.2344","justification":"Contains extensive measures on social behaviour and attitudes, political attitudes, and evaluations of government and political institutions in Germany around 1990."},{"title":"German General Social Survey - ALLBUS 1992","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.2346","justification":"Includes social and political attitudes, party preferences, evaluations of political system and institutions in Germany in the early 1990s."},{"title":"German General Social Survey - ALLBUS 1994","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.2348","justification":"Covers social behaviour, political attitudes and trust in institutions, including views on government and political organisations in Germany mid-1990s."},{"title":"German General Social Survey - ALLBUS 1996","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.2350","justification":"Provides rich indicators of social and political behaviour, party support, institutional trust and political system evaluations in Germany 1996."},{"title":"German General Social Survey - ALLBUS 1998","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.2352","justification":"Focuses on social structure, social and political attitudes, party identification, trust in government and political institutions in Germany 1998."},{"title":"German Longitudinal Election Study (GLES) 1990: Federal Election Campaign Panel","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA2390","justification":"Election study on the 1990 Bundestag election in Germany; examines voting behaviour, campaign dynamics, party evaluations and attitudes towards the political system and government."},{"title":"German Federal Election Study 1994 (Pre- and Post-Election Cross-Section)","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA2620","justification":"Covers political behaviour and attitudes of German voters during the 1994 Bundestag election, including party choice, evaluations of parties, candidates and government performance."},{"title":"German Federal Election Study 1998 (Pre- and Post-Election Cross-Section)","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA3065","justification":"Examines electoral behaviour and political attitudes in the 1998 Bundestag election; includes questions on parties, government, political system and institutions."},{"title":"The German Federal Republic Election Study 1990 (Cross-Section)","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA1900","justification":"Nationwide cross-section on voting behaviour and political attitudes in the 1990 federal election; focuses on party preferences, political participation and views of government."},{"title":"Political Attitudes, Political Participation and Voter Behaviour in the Federal Republic (German Election Study 1998 – Rolling Cross-Section/Panel)","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA3061","justification":"Rolling cross-section/panel examining political behaviour, campaign effects, party and government evaluations, and attitudes towards the political system in Germany during the 1998 election."}]}
